questions.subject: Polity
questions.prompt: Under the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS) 2023, murder by a group (mob lynching) is specifically penalized if committed on certain grounds. Which of the following are mentioned as valid grounds for this offence in the Sanhita?

options.text: Race, Caste, Community, Sex, Language, and Belief
Caste, Religion, and Political Affiliation only

questions.explanation: The BNS 2023 identifies group-based murder (often referred to as mob lynching) when committed on the grounds of race, caste, community, sex, language, or belief. The punishment for such an offence is death or life imprisonment along with a fine.
questions.takeaway: The BNS 2023 provides a broad list of protected categories under the new provision for group-based violence and murder.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: Group-based Violence: Murder by a group on grounds of race, caste, community, sex, language, belief, etc.: Death or life imprisonment and fine.
